title: Debrecen Heat Wave
lead: Debrecen is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Debrecen is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.7 GG and humidity at 15%. 
 The low humidity and moderate wind speed of 14.0 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, further emphasizing the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
